}

={
  "email": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.email }}",
  "stripe_customer_id": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.customerId }}",
  "stripe_subscription_id": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.subscriptionId }}",
  "old_tier": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.oldTier }}",
  "new_tier": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.newTier }}",
  "old_price_id": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.oldPriceId }}",
  "new_price_id": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.newPriceId }}",
  "change_type": "downgrade",
  "revoked_features": {{ JSON.stringify($('Merge User Data').first().json.revokedFeatures) }},
  "changed_at": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.updatedAt }}"
}
